message:
feat: integrate features with image manager buildImage

Add minimal features processing to ImageManager.buildImage:
- Check if devConfig.Features exists and not empty
- Call feature resolver to resolve features and dependencies
- Call Dockerfile generator to create Dockerfile with features
- Use generated Dockerfile for Docker build
- Write generated Dockerfile to .devcontainer/Dockerfile.generated
- Use temporary Dockerfile in build command

Test coverage:
- Add TestImageManager_BuildWithFeatures with real feature setup
- Verify buildImage calls Docker build when features present
- Create test feature with metadata and install script

Integration flow:
1. EnsureAvailable checks for features first
2. buildImage delegates to buildWithFeatures if features present
3. buildWithFeatures resolves, generates, and builds in one flow
